name: Golden Nest
fullDescription: Golden Nest is a warm and elegant residence designed with a perfect blend of comfort and luxury. The interior features soft golden tones that create a welcoming and premium atmosphere. Carefully arranged lighting enhances the cozy yet sophisticated vibe of the space. Every corner is thoughtfully designed to provide both relaxation and style, making it ideal for modern living with a touch of classic elegance.

name: Imperial Golden Residence
fullDescription: Imperial Golden Residence reflects true royal sophistication with its luxurious golden-themed interior and refined detailing. The space is enriched with elegant décor, premium furniture, and a majestic ambiance that feels both grand and comfortable. Large windows bring natural light that enhances the golden tones, creating a palace-like living experience designed for those who appreciate high-end lifestyle and timeless beauty.

name: Azure Comfort Home
fullDescription: Azure Comfort Home offers a calm and refreshing living experience with its soft bluish-white theme. The minimal yet modern design focuses on comfort, simplicity, and functionality. Natural light blends beautifully with the cool tones, creating a peaceful environment perfect for relaxation. This home is ideal for those who prefer a clean, airy, and stress-free modern lifestyle.

name: Urban Luxe Residence
fullDescription: Urban Luxe Residence is a modern masterpiece that combines contemporary design with urban sophistication. Featuring stylish interiors, designer lighting, and premium finishes, it creates a bold yet elegant living space. The mix of textures and modern décor elements gives it a luxurious city-life feel, making it perfect for those who love a trendy and high-class lifestyle.

name: Mountain View Retreat
fullDescription: Mountain View Retreat is a serene escape surrounded by natural beauty and breathtaking hill views. The wooden interior and glass walls create a perfect connection between indoor comfort and outdoor scenery. Warm textures and natural materials enhance the peaceful atmosphere, making it an ideal place for relaxation, reflection, and a nature-inspired lifestyle.

name: Alpine Serenity Home
fullDescription: Alpine Serenity Home is a peaceful luxury retreat inspired by snowy mountain landscapes and pure natural beauty. The interior design combines soft neutral tones with calming greenish accents, creating a deeply relaxing environment. Large glass walls open up to breathtaking icy hill views, allowing natural light and scenery to become part of the living space. Artistic wall frames and elegant décor elements add a refined touch, making this home perfect for those who seek tranquility, privacy, and a close connection with nature in a modern luxury setting.

name: Romance Haven Residence
fullDescription: Romance Haven Residence is designed to create a warm, emotional, and intimate living experience. The soft pink and romantic theme blends beautifully with elegant lighting and cozy interior details. Every element of the room is carefully chosen to enhance comfort and emotional connection, making it ideal for couples or anyone who appreciates a peaceful and affectionate atmosphere. The luxurious yet soft design language makes this residence feel both stylish and heartwarming.

name: CyberNest Home
fullDescription: CyberNest Home is a futuristic living space inspired by modern technology and digital aesthetics. The interior features smart lighting designs that resemble circuit or motherboard patterns, giving it a unique tech-inspired identity. Sleek furniture, modern textures, and ambient lighting create a bold and innovative environment. This home is perfect for tech enthusiasts and modern lifestyle lovers who appreciate creativity, innovation, and futuristic design concepts.

name: Orbit Luxury Residence
fullDescription: Orbit Luxury Residence showcases a bold and artistic modern design centered around a unique circular bed layout. The room is enhanced with dramatic lighting and a stylish rock-textured feature wall that adds depth and character. A cactus plant and minimal furniture bring balance between nature and modern art. This residence is designed for those who love unique architecture, creative interior concepts, and luxurious modern living with a distinctive identity.

name: Signature Home
fullDescription: Signature Home represents a perfect blend of modern elegance and timeless simplicity. The interior is designed with a clean and balanced layout that emphasizes comfort and functionality. Soft lighting, premium materials, and minimal décor create a sophisticated yet welcoming atmosphere. This home is ideal for individuals who appreciate refined living spaces that are both practical and aesthetically pleasing.

name: Nature Bliss Residence
fullDescription: Nature Bliss Residence is a refreshing blend of modern comfort and natural beauty. Designed with soft greenish tones and artistic wall décor, this home creates a calm and rejuvenating atmosphere. The highlight of the space is its beautifully framed bird artwork and nature-inspired interior elements that bring life and serenity into the room. It is a perfect choice for those who love peaceful living surrounded by artistic natural vibes and modern elegance.

name: Regal Horizon Residence
fullDescription: Regal Horizon Residence offers a luxurious living experience with breathtaking open views and royal-inspired design elements. The wide glass windows create a strong connection between indoor comfort and endless sky horizons. Elegant lighting, premium textures, and balanced interior styling make this home feel both majestic and modern. It is designed for individuals who appreciate open space, natural light, and a grand lifestyle with a refined royal touch.

name: Royal Residence
fullDescription: Royal Residence is a classic expression of elegance and sophistication. Designed with a balanced mix of traditional luxury and modern comfort, this home delivers a timeless royal atmosphere. Rich interior detailing, stylish furniture, and warm lighting enhance its premium appeal. Every corner reflects dignity and class, making it ideal for those who prefer a simple yet powerful royal lifestyle.

name: Royal Sapphire Haven
fullDescription: Royal Sapphire Haven is a bold and luxurious blue-themed residence that represents power, depth, and elegance. The interior is enhanced with multiple chandelier lights and rich sapphire-inspired tones that create a dramatic royal ambiance. Premium furnishings and artistic lighting effects elevate the overall mood, making it a perfect space for those who love high-end, statement-making luxury interiors.

name: Amour Residence
fullDescription: Amour Residence is a romantic and elegant living space designed with soft pinkish tones and cozy interior details. The atmosphere feels warm, intimate, and emotionally rich, making it perfect for couples or anyone who values comfort and love-inspired design. The lighting and textures work together to create a soothing and luxurious romantic environment that feels both personal and stylish.

name: Modern Haven
fullDescription: Modern Haven is a clean and stylish residence designed for today’s modern lifestyle. The interior focuses on simplicity, functionality, and elegance with a minimal yet premium design approach. Soft lighting and balanced color tones create a calm and comfortable atmosphere. It is perfect for those who prefer a clutter-free, smart, and contemporary living space that feels both practical and refined.

name: Serenity House
fullDescription: Serenity House is a peaceful and calming retreat designed to offer pure relaxation and comfort. The soft interior tones combined with natural lighting create a soothing environment that feels stress-free and refreshing. With scenic views and carefully designed aesthetics, this home brings a perfect balance between nature and modern luxury, making it ideal for peaceful living.

name: Elite Residence
fullDescription: Elite Residence represents premium urban living with a strong focus on luxury and sophistication. The interior design features high-end materials, elegant lighting, and a refined layout that reflects exclusivity. Every detail is carefully crafted to deliver a high-status lifestyle experience, making it suitable for those who prefer top-tier comfort and modern elegance.

name: Grand Vista Home
fullDescription: Grand Vista Home offers a breathtaking living experience with wide open views and spacious interiors. The design emphasizes natural light, openness, and architectural balance. Large windows and premium finishes enhance the feeling of grandeur, making this home perfect for those who value scenic beauty and luxurious space combined in one elegant residence.

name: Prestige Villa
fullDescription: Prestige Villa is a symbol of ultimate luxury and sophistication. Designed with premium architectural details and a refined interior layout, it offers a high-class living experience. The combination of elegant décor, modern features, and spacious design creates a villa that reflects prestige, comfort, and exclusivity. It is ideal for those who desire a truly elite lifestyle.
